general.name: mos_target_gedr3spur_main
general.description: This table contains estimates of the "fidelity" of Gaia eDR3 astrometric solutions, a measure of the likelihood the eDR3 solution is physical rather than spurious obtained using a neural network trained on a small, hand-selected sample.
general.naming_convention: $MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_gedr3spur_main-[NUM].[FTYPE] with FTYPE='fits', V_TARG='2.0.0', and NUM=1..31 for DR20.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

source_id.name: source_id
source_id.description: Gaia DR3 unique source identifier. Matches the source_id column in the dr20_gaia_dr3_source table.

fidelity_v2.name: fidelity_v2
fidelity_v2.description: A probability that eDR3 has a good astrometric solution for this source, with values between 0 (meaning likely spurious solution) and 1 (meaning likely good solution). This is the published probability estimate.

theta_arcsec_worst_source.name: theta_arcsec_worst_source
theta_arcsec_worst_source.description: Distance to the eDR3 source within 30 arcsec of the object for which delta_g-theta is maximal. See norm_dg for details.

norm_dg.name: norm_dg
norm_dg.description: This is a heuristic measure for contamination by bright stars in the neighbourhood. It is computed as delta_g-theta, where theta is the distance to another Gaia eDR3 object in arcsec (reported in theta_arcsec_worst_source), and delta_g is the magnitude difference in mag. This column gives the maximum of the values for all eDR3 sources within 30 arcsecs of the object.

dist_nearest_neighbor_at_least_m2_bright.name: dist_nearest_neighbor_at_least_m2_brighter
dist_nearest_neighbor_at_least_m2_bright.description: Distance to the nearest neighbour in gaia_source at least 2 m fainter than this source.

dist_nearest_neighbor_at_least_0_brighte.name: dist_nearest_neighbor_at_least_0_brighter
dist_nearest_neighbor_at_least_0_brighte.description: Distance to the nearest neighbour in gaia_source at least as bright as this source.

dist_nearest_neighbor_at_least_2_brighte.name: dist_nearest_neighbor_at_least_2_brighter
dist_nearest_neighbor_at_least_2_brighte.description: Distance to the nearest neighbour in gaia_source at least 2 m brighter than this source.

dist_nearest_neighbor_at_least_4_brighte.name: dist_nearest_neighbor_at_least_4_brighter
dist_nearest_neighbor_at_least_4_brighte.description: Distance to the nearest neighbour in gaia_source at least 4 m brighter than this source.

dist_nearest_neighbor_at_least_6_brighte.name: dist_nearest_neighbor_at_least_6_brighter
dist_nearest_neighbor_at_least_6_brighte.description: Distance to the nearest neighbour in gaia_source at least 6 m brighter than this source.

dist_nearest_neighbor_at_least_10_bright.name: dist_nearest_neighbor_at_least_10_brighter
dist_nearest_neighbor_at_least_10_bright.description: Distance to the nearest neighbour in gaia_source at least 10 m brighter than this source.

fidelity_v1.name: fidelity_v1
fidelity_v1.description: A probablity that eDR3 has a good astrometric solution for this source, with values between 0 (meaning likely spurious solution) and 1 (meaning likely good solution). This comes from a first version of the estimator that was reviewed based on an astro-ph paper.
